query: overcast gray flat lighting dull cloudy day no shadows depth collapsed
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: flat lighting — overcast gray, foggy collapsed depth, dull cloudy atmosphere, monotone bleakness

response.objective_caption: A large rock emerges from the center of a still lake, surrounded by glassy water that reflects a dense evergreen forest along the distant shoreline. Tall grasses grow along the near shore in the foreground. Fog blankets the scene, obscuring the upper portions of the pine trees and blending the sky and horizon into a uniform pale gray expanse.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A large rock emerges from the center of a still lake, surrounded by glassy water that reflects a dense evergreen forest along the distant shoreline. Tall grasses grow along the near shore in the foreground. Heavy fog envelops the treetops and merges the sky and horizon into a uniform pale gray. The image employs a thoroughly muted, desaturated palette with weak separation between light and dark across the frame, producing a heavy, oppressive atmosphere that evokes melancholy and unease.
